response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, reported a total revenue of $54.4 million for the year, showcasing an impressive year-over-year growth of 18%. In the first quarter, the company generated $12.3 million in revenue, followed by a second quarter with $14.1 million. The third quarter saw a slight dip in revenue to $11.8 million, but the fourth quarter rebounded strongly with $16.2 million. With a workforce of 342 employees, Acme Corp continues to demonstrate robust financial performance and growth.
